title: Molten Crispy Uruguayan Paccheri Pasta
description: Fresh, snappy, solo-dinner Uruguayan dish featuring paccheri pasta, lamination-puff, raw-friendly.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the paccheri pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a blender or food processor, combine garlic, butter, parmesan cheese, eggs, milk, salt, and black pepper, blending until smooth.
With a spatula, scrape the side of the blender or food processor to ensure all ingredients are well incorporated.
Add the cooked paccheri pasta to the blender or food processor and blend until the pasta is well coated with the cheese mixture.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated parmesan cheese.
Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Optional: Add some grilled vegetables or a side salad for a more substantial meal.
